requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling under AZS/IEC 60335-2-24
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——AZS/IEC 60335-2-24下的R-600a可燃制冷剂处理
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——AZS/IEC 60335-2-24下的R-600a可燃製冷劑處理

summary.en: Household refrigerators and freezers marketed in Azerbaijan have overwhelmingly transitioned to R-600a （isobutane, a hydrocarbon refrigerant with very low global warming potential, GWP ≈ 3）. Refrigerant safety for these appliances is addressed through the adopted AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 standard, whose Annex AA sets requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants — maximum R-600a charge per compartment configuration, ventilation requirements, and ignition-source provisions. Manufacturers should: (1) verify that the refrigerant charge complies with the AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA flammability limits; (2) ensure product documentation declares the refrigerant designation （R-600a / isobutane）and charge quantity （grams）; (3) confirm any country-specific environmental or import provisions for refrigerants. Azerbaijan is a party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment governing the phase-down of hydrofluorocarbons （HFCs）, administered nationally; R-600a, as a hydrocarbon, is not an HFC and is well-positioned with respect to HFC phase-down obligations. Any models still using an HFC （e.g., R-134a）should be checked against current national HFC controls.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆市场销售的家用电冰箱和冷冻箱已大量转向R-600a（异丁烷，一种全球变暖潜能值极低的碳氢化合物制冷剂，GWP约3）。此类器具的制冷剂安全通过所采用的AZS/IEC 60335-2-24标准处理，其附件AA规定了使用可燃制冷剂器具的要求——每种隔间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风要求及点火源规定。制造商应：（1）核实制冷剂充注量符合AZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性限值；（2）确保产品文件声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）确认任何国别特定的制冷剂环境或进口规定。阿塞拜疆为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其管控氢氟烃（HFC）削减的《基加利修正案》缔约方，由国家层面管理；R-600a作为碳氢化合物并非HFC，在HFC削减义务方面条件良好。任何仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的型号应对照现行国家HFC管控核查。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然市場銷售的家用電冰箱和冷凍箱已大量轉向R-600a（異丁烷，一種全球暖化潛能值極低的碳氫化合物製冷劑，GWP約3）。此類器具的製冷劑安全通過所採用的AZS/IEC 60335-2-24標準處理，其附件AA規定了使用可燃製冷劑器具的要求——每種隔間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風要求及點火源規定。製造商應：（1）核實製冷劑充注量符合AZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性限值；（2）確保產品文件聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）確認任何國別特定的製冷劑環境或進口規定。亞塞拜然為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其管控氫氟碳化物（HFC）削減的《基加利修正案》締約方，由國家層面管理；R-600a作為碳氫化合物並非HFC，在HFC削減義務方面條件良好。任何仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的型號應對照現行國家HFC管控核查。

standards_or_laws: AZS adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants （R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition source requirements）
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification （R-600a classified A3: lower flammability）
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — Azerbaijan HFC phase-down obligations （administered nationally）

summary.en: For household appliances, China addresses flammable-refrigerant （R-600a）charge limits within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24. China also regulates refrigerant safety through GB 9237 （safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps, aligned with ISO 5149）. China operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol （ratified June 2021）, administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment （MEE）. Because both China and Azerbaijan derive household-appliance flammable-refrigerant requirements from the IEC 60335-2-24 lineage, Chinese R-600a appliances are generally well-positioned for the refrigerant aspect, but charge amounts and documentation must be verified against the Azerbaijani-adopted standard editions.
summary.zh: 家用器具方面，中国在GB 4706.13-2014中处理可燃制冷剂（R-600a）充注量限制，其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定。中国还通过GB 9237（制冷系统和热泵的安全要求，参照ISO 5149）管理制冷剂安全。中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书·基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国与阿塞拜疆的家用器具可燃制冷剂要求均源自IEC 60335-2-24谱系，中国R-600a器具在制冷剂方面一般条件良好，但充注量及文件须对照阿塞拜疆所采用的标准版本核实。
summary.zht: 家用器具方面，中國在GB 4706.13-2014中處理可燃製冷劑（R-600a）充注量限制，其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定。中國還通過GB 9237（製冷系統和熱泵的安全要求，參照ISO 5149）管理製冷劑安全。中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書·基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國與亞塞拜然的家用器具可燃製冷劑要求均源自IEC 60335-2-24譜系，中國R-600a器具在製冷劑方面一般條件良好，但充注量及文件須對照亞塞拜然所採用的標準版本核實。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Annex provisions for flammable refrigerant （R-600a）requirements in household refrigerating appliances （derived from IEC 60335-2-24）
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps （aligned with ISO 5149）
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule （ratified June 2021, administered by MEE）

gap.en: For R-600a appliances, the main gap is documentation and charge verification rather than a fundamental technology gap, since both China and Azerbaijan derive their requirements from IEC 60335-2-24: (1) Product documentation submitted in Azerbaijan should explicitly state the refrigerant designation （R-600a / isobutane）, charge weight in grams, and relevant safety precautions per AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA; (2) the exact R-600a charge must be verified against the Annex AA maximum limits of the Azerbaijani-adopted edition — these depend on room volume and appliance configuration, and Chinese CCC test reports may not explicitly confirm the Azerbaijani-edition charge limits if tested under slightly different configurations; (3) any model still using R-134a or another HFC should be assessed against Azerbaijan's national HFC phase-down controls under the Kigali Amendment. The exact adopted AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 edition and any national refrigerant import provisions should be confirmed before regulatory submission.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，主要差距在于文件和充注量核实，而非根本性技术差距，因为中国与阿塞拜疆的要求均源自IEC 60335-2-24：（1）在阿塞拜疆提交的产品文件应明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据AZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的相关安全注意事项；（2）须对照阿塞拜疆所采用版本的附件AA最大限值核实确切的R-600a充注量——该限值取决于房间容积和器具配置，若中国CCC检测报告在略有不同的配置下测试，可能未明确确认符合阿塞拜疆版本的充注量限值；（3）任何仍使用R-134a或其他HFC的型号，应对照阿塞拜疆依据《基加利修正案》的国家HFC削减管控进行评估。所采用的确切AZS/IEC 60335-2-24版本及任何国家制冷剂进口规定，应在监管提交前确认。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，主要差距在於文件和充注量核實，而非根本性技術差距，因為中國與亞塞拜然的要求均源自IEC 60335-2-24：（1）在亞塞拜然提交的產品文件應明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據AZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的相關安全注意事項；（2）須對照亞塞拜然所採用版本的附件AA最大限值核實確切的R-600a充注量——該限值取決於房間容積和器具配置，若中國CCC檢測報告在略有不同的配置下測試，可能未明確確認符合亞塞拜然版本的充注量限值；（3）任何仍使用R-134a或其他HFC的型號，應對照亞塞拜然依據《基加利修正案》的國家HFC削減管控進行評估。所採用的確切AZS/IEC 60335-2-24版本及任何國家製冷劑進口規定，應在監管提交前確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA （R-600a charge limits）; HFC controls under the Montreal Protocol Kigali Amendment apply nationally to any HFC-based models
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 （R-600a charge limits）; China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in Azerbaijani-market household refrigerators and, as a hydrocarbon, is well-positioned relative to HFC phase-down obligations. Manufacturers must verify R-600a charge against AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits and explicitly document the refrigerant type and charge weight. Any HFC-based models should be assessed against Azerbaijan's national Kigali Amendment HFC controls before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是阿塞拜疆市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，作为碳氢化合物在HFC削减义务方面条件良好。制造商须核实R-600a充注量是否符合AZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，并明确记录制冷剂类型及充注量。任何含HFC的型号在进入市场前应对照阿塞拜疆国家《基加利修正案》HFC管控进行评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是亞塞拜然市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，作為碳氫化合物在HFC削減義務方面條件良好。製造商須核實R-600a充注量是否符合AZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，並明確記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。任何含HFC的型號在進入市場前應對照亞塞拜然國家《基加利修正案》HFC管控進行評估。
